name: Low Calorie Low Fat Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugars, margarine, vanilla, and egg white.
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Note: These cookies are very sweet due to the use of egg white and have minimal fat content. The dough is crumbly, so form it into balls with your hands or spoon before baking. They take about 8 minutes to bake and can be moved to cooling racks after 5 minutes on the sheet. Despite their low calorie and fat content, these cookies are delicious. Enjoy!
